title: Regtek Consulting | Data-Driven PPC, Web Design & CRO
metaDescription: Skip the big agency runaround. Work directly with the founder on Google Ads, Meta Ads, and websites built to convert. Free strategy call available.

headings.text:
Turn Your Marketing Into

            Predictable Revenue
You've Built Something Great Through Word-of-Mouth. Now It's Time to Scale.
That's exactly where we come in.

The Results Speak

            Louder Than We Do
We Don't Just Do Marketing, We Understand Your Business.

From Growing Practice

            To Market Leader
Want to know which services fit your goals?
You'll Work Directly With The Founder
Ready to Stop Guessing and Start Growing?

bodyContent:
Home
Services
About
Tips & Tricks
Contact
Book Free Consultation
Small Business Digital Marketing
Turn Your Marketing Into Predictable Revenue
Work directly with a founder who's scaled a healthcare business to Inc 5000 status. Get strategic guidance that goes beyond marketing - backed by proven results.
Book Your Free Consultation Today
5 Star Client Reviews
Trusted by Small Businesses
63%+

Paid Search Growth


2,000+

Conversions Managed

$100K+

Ad Spend Managed

The Results Speak Louder Than We Do

Local Practice Achieves 63% Booking Growth

This podiatry clinic wanted to move beyond referrals. With a strategic paid search campaign, they grew bookings 63%—with Google Ads now driving 169 new patients.
From Growing Practice To Market Leader

Built a Scalable Patient Acquisition Engine

A growing dermatology practice in Hawaii needed patient acquisition that could scale with them. We built a paid search engine that's driven consistent growth for nearly two years.
Read The Case Study
You'll Work Directly With The Founder

Hi, I'm Kevin Dillon, the founder of Regtek Consulting. Before starting this agency, I ran operations for a healthcare clinic that scaled to five offices and achieved Inc 5000 recognition.

That experience taught me what most agencies miss: marketing isn't just about clicks. It's about understanding your entire business. That's why you work directly with me. No account managers, no handoffs. Just strategic guidance from someone who's built and scaled a real business.

Oh, and the name? Regtek is named after my dog, Reggie. He's the real boss around here. 
LEARN MORE
Regtek

Data-Driven Marketing. Real Results.


Named after our founder's best friend
